description: Clean e-filed confirmation statement, three individual shareholders with explicit shareholdings.
inputText:
# Confirmation Statement (CS01)

Company Number: 09876543
Company Name: ACME WIDGETS LIMITED
Statement date: 14 March 2023

## Statement of capital

Class of shares: Ordinary
Number of shares: 100
Aggregate nominal value: GBP 100

## Shareholdings

|-------------|----------|-------------|------------|
| John A. Smith | Ordinary | 60 | 60% |
| Mary Patel | Ordinary | 30 | 30% |
| Riverside Holdings Ltd | Ordinary | 10 | 10% |

The company confirms that the information in this statement is correct as at the statement date.
